name: Petal 1 No Annual Fee Visa Credit Card
perks: Uses cash flow underwriting (links bank account to analyze income and spending patterns)
Designed for applicants with no credit history, thin credit, or fair credit
No annual fee, no foreign transaction fees
Petal Offers: 2-10% cash back at select local and national merchants
Reports to all three major credit bureaus monthly
Free credit score monitoring via app
Credit limit up to $5,000 based on cash flow analysis
Pathway to Petal 2 after building credit history
drawbacks: No baseline cash back rate (0% except through Petal Offers merchants)
Requires linking bank account for cash flow review
High APR range especially for those with poor credit
Petal Offers are merchant-specific and not guaranteed
Spending limit may be lower than expected based on banking history
